Tooltip_RCStructureFramework_InvalidSize: This structure size is not valid.
Tooltip_RCStructureFramework_InvalidPlac: This structure cannot be placed here.
Tooltip_RCStructureFramework_EditLevelDo: Lower the active edit Z (paint layer).
Tooltip_RCStructureFramework_EditLevelUp: Raise the active edit Z (paint layer).
Tooltip_RCStructureFramework_EditFootpri: Go back to footprint editing. Painted walls and floors are kept where the new footprint still covers them; the rest is removed on Accept.
Tooltip_RCStructureFramework_Pipette: Middle-click a placed piece to make it the active piece. Click again to cycle through stacked pieces.
